mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(memberno, name, email, password, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, address, phone, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone,point) VALUES (member_seq.nextval, #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{profile}, #{birthdate}, #{gender}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{guardian_name}, #{guardian_relationship}, #{guardian_email}, #{guardian_phone}, #{guardian2_name}, #{guardian2_relationship}, #{guardian2_email}, #{guardian2_phone},#{point})
mapper.select: SELECT memberno, name, email, password, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, address, phone, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone, login_time, logout_time, point FROM member WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
